The 1st Test of the Afghanistan Tour of India 2026 marks the start of a only Test match. Watch India vs Afghanistan 1st Test live in HD on tapmad, with official match coverage and uninterrupted streaming. These top-ranked red-ball teams, to begin with a strong squad, India will look to make the most of home conditions with a well-balanced squad, while Afghanistan aim to challenge with a disciplined unit capable of competing in all aspects of the game.
